name: iobroker.victronadapter
description: ioBroker adapter for Victron GX/Cerbo GX with fixed circular Lovelace energy flow view.
author: Geht Euch <gehteuchnichtsanandroid56@gmail.com>

scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:unit && npm run test:package
scripts.test:js: node --check main.js && node --check lib/modbusClient.js && node --check lib/registerMap.js && node --check lovelace/victronadapter-card.js
scripts.test:integration: node -e "console.log('No integration tests required for local Modbus adapter metadata check')"
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run adapter-check
